india_trends.title: Akasa Air sets up entity for aircraft financing, leasing in GIFT City
india_trends.summary: Akasa Air has set up a new entity at GIFT City in Gujarat. This move aims to boost its aircraft financing and leasing operations. The new company, Akasa Air Leasing IFSC Private Limited, will help the airline secure better financing. It will also allow for more flexibility and cost efficiency.

india_trends.title: Multibagger Thermax stock jumps 14% to fresh record high after strong Q4 performance
india_trends.summary: Thermax shares surged 14% to ₹4,759 after a strong March quarter, with an 18% profit increase to ₹244 crore. FY26 revenue rose 3% to ₹10,694 crore, with a 27% increase in order balance. The company also announced dividends totaling ₹20 per share.

india_trends.title: SBI dividend: India's largest lender announces ₹17.35/share dividend. Check record date
india_trends.summary: SBI dividend: India's largest lender, State Bank of India, announced a dividend of ₹17.35 per share along with its financial results for the fourth quarter of fiscal 2025-26 (FY26) on Friday, 8 May.

india_trends.title: SBI Q4 Results: Standalone profit rises 6% YoY to Rs 19,684 crore, beats estimates
india_trends.summary: SBI Q4 Results: State Bank of India reported a 6% year-on-year rise in standalone net profit to Rs 19,684 crore for the fourth quarter, exceeding analyst expectations. The bank also declared a dividend of Rs 17.35 per share. Despite a decline in operating profit, asset quality improved with a lower

india_trends.title: Titan Q4 Results: Cons profit jumps 35% YoY to Rs 1,179 crore; Rs 15/share dividend announced
india_trends.summary: Titan Q4 Results: Titan Company reported a robust 35% growth in net profit for Q4FY26, reaching Rs 1,179 crore, driven by a strong performance in its jewellery segment. The company's total income surged by 46% to Rs 20,300 crore. Titan's Board also recommended a dividend of Rs 15 per equity share.

india_trends.title: Dabur’s home and personal care biz shines, but overall growth is modest
india_trends.summary: According to estimates, Dabur's Ebitda margins could improve over 19% by FY28, although this still depends heavily on raw material inflation and rural demand recovery.

india_trends.title: SBI Q4 results 2026: Profit rises 6% YoY to ₹19,684 crore, NIM shrinks- Key takeaways
india_trends.summary: SBI Q4 results 2026: Profit rose 6% YoY to ₹19,684 crore in Q4FY26. For the entire financial year 2026, SBI's profit rose by nearly 13% YoY to ₹80,032.01 crore from ₹70,900.63 crore in FY25.&nbsp;
